recovery_run: Pipeline crashed mid-assessor; 10 of 15 priority assessments already written. This recovery run completed the 5 missing priority assessments (burkina-faso, south-sudan, sudan, somalia, yemen) and assembled the full 15-entity cycle summary. No re-assessment or overwrite of the 10 complete entities.

results.name: Kuwait
results.key_finding: Iran War Day 2 + Doha talks. Iran's missile/drone attack on Kuwait is IRAN's conduct (attribution), not Kuwait's. Kuwait's own conduct — effective interception, no fatalities, no internal crackdown — is consistent with its Developing band. Surfaced on a negative-theater event: directionality blocks an upgrade; no new own-harm blocks a downgrade. Confirm 25.0; watch ACT/EQU (bidoon + migrant emergency protection).

results.name: Bahrain
results.key_finding: Iran War Day 2. Iranian drone damage in Muharraq is IRAN's conduct (attribution), not Bahrain's. Bahrain's 9.4 already prices its OWN documented repression (2011 legacy, political prisoners, citizenship-stripping, Shia-majority discrimination). No new within-window own-conduct either direction. Confirm 9.4; watch EQU/ACC (wartime emergency powers, political prisoners).

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Earthquake Day 6 response screen. The quake is a natural disaster (exogenous, not own-conduct). Government response remains genuinely mixed — broad aid acceptance vs slow/opaque relief — netting sub-threshold both directions. Confirm 18.0; watch ACT (relief speed/coverage) + ACC (casualty-data transparency).

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Lean-season peak double-count screen. 35M IPC Phase 3+ / 15,000 Phase 5 Borno already priced in the Jun 19 band crossing to 18.0. WFP imminent cuts and a formal IPC Phase 5 declaration are forward triggers. No materially new development Jun 30. Confirm 18.0.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Post-ceasefire strikes attribution screen. The Jun 28 Washington framework collapsed within 48 hours; the forward-trigger positive (implementation) did not materialize — no upgrade. Renewed war harm is Israel's conduct (attribution). No new Lebanese own-conduct either direction. Confirm 17.2; watch BND/ACT.

results.name: Qatar
results.key_finding: Al Udeid strike and a Qatari shrapnel death are IRAN's conduct (attribution). Qatar's Doha-mediation role (Jun 30 talks) is mild positive own-conduct but consistent with its established posture — sub-threshold. 10.9 prices chronic migrant-labor/rights limits. Confirm 10.9; watch EQU (wartime migrant protection) + BND (mediation).

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Pre-adjudication screen. DOJ criminal/civil/antitrust probes are investigations, not convictions. Jun 23 DOJ takedown ($6.5B, 455 defendants) is sector context, not entity-named. Near-floor 10.2 already prices the alleged pattern. No new UHG-specific development. Confirm 10.2; watch ACC (DOJ outcome).

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: third-largest-ever Ebola outbreak now spread to a 4th province (Haut-Uele); own-conduct response weakness compounds M23 mass-killing harm attributed to Rwanda. Compounding already-priced crises; no new threshold. Confirm 2.3; watch ACT (Ebola response) + AWR (cross-border spread).

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: UN COI genocide finding (Jun 23) and resumed Lebanon strikes (Jun 28) are negative own-conduct. The framework did not mandate withdrawal — not positive own-conduct. No lower score exists. Confirm 0.0; watch ACT (Gaza 77% food insecurity) + ACC (ICC warrants).

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced. The Gulf strikes ARE Iran's own negative conduct (correctly scored against Iran); 784+ executions YTD (37-year high); Hormuz mining endangering civilian shipping. Continuation of an already-priced pattern; military-base strikes with limited civilian casualties do not clear a new threshold toward the floor. Confirm 2.5.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: 52.8M Sahel food insecurity + largest IDP population after Nigeria + 3.5M besieged continue the already-priced (Jun 1 reweighted) arc. Scan notes no new development Jun 30. Sahel calibration flag-for-review remains open at coordinator level (Mali 12.5 vs BF 6.3); no assessor one-off. Confirm 6.3.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: 7.8M food insecure (56%), 2.2M children acutely malnourished, four counties at famine risk, WFP serving ~1.5M fewer than planned. New Jun 30 factor: DRC Ebola spread to bordering Haut-Uele is an exogenous, forward cross-border risk (not own-conduct). Already-priced; no lower score exists. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: SAF/al-Burhan rejected the Quad humanitarian ceasefire Jun 29; El Obeid 500,000+ besieged; famine in El-Fasher/Kadugli; US State Dept 'imminent risk of mass atrocities.' Scan notes no new development Jun 30 beyond Jun 29. RSF's ceasefire acceptance is unimplemented (forward trigger). No lower score exists. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: Somalia
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: Buur Hakaba reaches IPC AMN Phase 5 (GAM 37.1%); ~1.88M children needing acute-malnutrition treatment in 2026; ~6M (1-in-3) at Crisis or worse; WFP reaching ~1-in-10. Drivers are drought, regional price shocks, and Al-Shabaab (exogenous/non-state); only government response is scorable and remains in-band. No new formal famine declaration Jun 30. Confirm 4.7; watch formal Phase 5 declaration.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: Houthi authorities forced WFP to terminate all 365 northern staff contracts; 73 UN staff detained; 22.3M need aid; 18.3M acutely food insecure; 12.7% appeal funded. Governing-actor own conduct. Doha-talks/Hormuz dynamic is a delivery-cost forward factor. No new specific development Jun 30. No lower score exists. Confirm 0.0.

false_positives_screened.screened: 52.8M Sahel food insecurity + IDP/siege totals continue the already-priced (Jun 1 reweighted) arc; scan notes no new development Jun 30. The open Sahel-band calibration (Mali 12.5 vs BF 6.3) is a coordinator-level flag-for-review, not an assessor one-off. Confirm 6.3.

7.8M / 2.2M figures continue the already-priced crisis. The DRC Ebola spread to bordering Haut-Uele is exogenous (DRC outbreak) and at this stage a forward cross-border risk, not realized harm scorable against South Sudan. Floor reinforced but cannot be lowered. Confirm 0.0.

SAF ceasefire rejection + El Obeid siege are negative own-conduct already captured Jun 29; no new development Jun 30. RSF's ceasefire acceptance is an unimplemented non-state forward trigger (no upgrade). RSF siege harm is non-state conduct. Floor reinforced but cannot be lowered. Confirm 0.0.

Drought (poor Gu rains), regional price shocks, and Al-Shabaab attacks are exogenous/non-state drivers; only government response capacity is scorable and remains in-band. Buur Hakaba Phase 5 / 6M Crisis+ continue the already-priced arc; no new formal famine declaration Jun 30. Surfaced on negative evidence (no upgrade); no new own-harm threshold (no downgrade). Confirm 4.7.

WFP staff terminations / UN detentions / 18.3M food-insecure already captured Jun 29; no new specific development Jun 30. Aid obstruction is Houthi governing-actor own conduct (reinforces floor). Doha-talks/Hormuz dynamic is a delivery-cost forward factor, not a new own-conduct move. Floor cannot be lowered. Confirm 0.0.

Iran's Jun 28-29 missile/drone attacks ON the Gulf states are IRAN's conduct (scored against Iran), not the Gulf states' own conduct. Each government scored on its OWN conduct (effective air defense, no internal crackdown documented) — competent civilian protection consistent with band, not strong countervailing compassion conduct. Surfaced on negative-theater events: directionality blocks upgrade; no new own-harm blocks downgrade. All confirm at live baselines.

The earthquake is a natural disaster (exogenous, not own-conduct). Only the response is scorable and remains mixed: broad aid acceptance (blocks downgrade) vs slow/opaque relief (directionality blocks upgrade). Net sub-threshold both directions. Confirm 18.0.
DOJ probes are investigations, not convictions. Jun 23 takedown is sector context, not entity-named. Near-floor 10.2 already prices the alleged pattern. Confirm 10.2.

35M Phase 3+ / 15,000 Phase 5 Borno already priced in the Jun 19 band crossing to 18.0. Re-scoring the same evidence would double-count. WFP cuts + Phase 5 declaration are forward triggers. Confirm 18.0.

Jun 28 framework collapsed within 48 hours. Forward-trigger positive (implementation) did not materialize — no upgrade. Renewed war harm is Israel's conduct. No new Lebanese own-conduct; absence of new own-harm is not positive evidence. Confirm 17.2.

M23 mass-killing harm attributed to Rwanda. DRC's own weak Ebola response (now spread to a 4th province) reinforces the near-floor but continues already-priced compounding crises; no new threshold. Confirm 2.3.

The Gulf strikes ARE Iran's own negative conduct (correctly scored against Iran), but Iran is near the floor at 2.5 and the strikes targeted military bases with limited civilian casualties — a continuation of an already-priced aggression+execution pattern, not NEW mass deliberate harm clearing the 5-point threshold toward the floor. Confirm 2.5.

At the absolute 0.0 floor. New negative own-conduct (UN COI genocide finding, resumed Lebanon strikes) reinforces but cannot lower a floor score. The framework did not mandate withdrawal — no positive own-conduct to support an upgrade. Confirm 0.0.

sahel_calibration_status: OPEN — coordinator-level Sahel-band reweight review carried forward (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3). Burkina Faso confirmed at 6.3; no assessor one-off (§3e-bis(5)).

math_hygiene.note: All 15 assessed at live-index baselines read from site/src/data/indexes/countries.json (and fortune-500.json for UnitedHealth). 5 recovery-run entities verified against live: Burkina Faso 6.3/rank174, South Sudan 0.0/rank189 (floorDesignation), Sudan 0.0/rank190 (floorDesignation), Somalia 4.7/rank179, Yemen 0.0/rank193. All deltas 0.0; no math-hygiene flags.

forward_triggers_logged: Burkina Faso: durable expansion of civilian protection/aid access = upgrade; intensified state-perpetration or siege = downgrade.
South Sudan: a realized Ebola incursion plus documented failure of South Sudan's own response = scorable own-conduct; an implemented famine-relief scale-up = positive own-conduct.
Sudan: an implemented, civilian-protecting ceasefire with unobstructed aid access = positive own-conduct.
Somalia: a formal IPC Phase 5 (Famine) declaration for Buur Hakaba/wider areas plus documented government aid obstruction = scorable toward the floor.
Yemen: durable reversal of Houthi aid obstruction and release of detained UN staff = positive own-conduct.
Kuwait: documented internal crackdown or discriminatory denial of emergency protection (esp. bidoon/migrants) = downgrade; durable expansion of bidoon/migrant rights = upgrade.
Nigeria: realized WFP assistance cuts and a formal IPC Phase 5 famine declaration in Borno.
DRC: collapse vs. competent scale-up of the Ebola response; cross-border spread containment.
UnitedHealth: a DOJ complaint, indictment, ruling, settlement, or admitted findings would be scorable.
